name: aishi
tagline: Global Leading Aluminum Electrolytic Capacitor Manufacturer
description: Aishi is a world-leading manufacturer of aluminum electrolytic capacitors, providing high-quality capacitor solutions for consumer electronics, industrial equipment, automotive electronics, and new energy applications.
longDescription: Founded in 1985, Aishi has grown to become one of the world's largest manufacturers of aluminum electrolytic capacitors. With over 35 years of experience in capacitor technology, Aishi produces more than 15 billion capacitors annually, serving customers across 80+ countries. The company operates state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities with fully automated production lines and comprehensive quality control systems. Aishi's product portfolio includes radial lead capacitors, snap-in capacitors, screw terminal capacitors, and solid polymer capacitors, covering voltage ratings from 6.3V to 550V and capacitance values from 0.1uF to 2,700,000uF. As an authorized distributor, LiTong Electronics provides comprehensive technical support and competitive pricing for Aishi products.

coreProducts.name: Radial Lead Capacitors
coreProducts.description: Standard radial aluminum electrolytic capacitors for general-purpose applications including consumer electronics, power supplies, and industrial controls. Available in voltage ratings from 6.3V to 450V with long lifetime options.

coreProducts.name: Snap-in Capacitors
coreProducts.description: High-capacitance snap-in capacitors designed for switch-mode power supplies, LED drivers, and industrial applications. Features high ripple current capability and extended lifetime ratings up to 15,000 hours.

coreProducts.name: Screw Terminal Capacitors
coreProducts.description: Large-can screw terminal capacitors for high-power applications including inverters, welding equipment, and industrial drives. Available in high voltage ratings up to 550V with excellent ripple current performance.

coreProducts.name: Solid Polymer Capacitors
coreProducts.description: High-performance solid polymer aluminum capacitors featuring ultra-low ESR, high ripple current capability, and extended lifetime. Ideal for high-frequency switching applications and automotive electronics.

industries.name: Consumer Electronics
industries.description: Capacitors for TVs, monitors, adapters, and home appliances requiring high reliability and cost-effective solutions.

industries.name: Industrial Equipment
industries.description: High-reliability capacitors for industrial power supplies, motor drives, and automation equipment with extended lifetime requirements.

industries.name: Automotive Electronics
industries.description: AEC-Q200 qualified capacitors for automotive applications including LED drivers, ECUs, and powertrain systems.

industries.name: New Energy
industries.description: High-performance capacitors for solar inverters, EV chargers, and energy storage systems with high ripple current capability.

seoTitle: Aishi Aluminum Electrolytic Capacitors | Authorized Distributor | LiTong Electronics
seoDescription: Authorized distributor of Aishi aluminum electrolytic capacitors. Radial, snap-in, screw terminal, and solid polymer capacitors for industrial, automotive, and consumer applications.

faqs.question: Is LiTong Electronics an authorized Aishi distributor?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong Electronics is an authorized distributor of Aishi aluminum electrolytic capacitors. We have established a strong partnership with Aishi since 2010, providing genuine products directly from Aishi's manufacturing facilities. Our authorization covers the complete range of Aishi products including radial lead, snap-in, screw terminal, and solid polymer capacitors.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to verify our distributor authorization and receive competitive quotations for your Aishi capacitor requirements.

faqs.question: What are Aishi's core competitive advantages?
faqs.answer: Aishi's core advantages include: 1) World's largest production capacity with over 15 billion units annually, ensuring stable supply and competitive pricing; 2) Comprehensive product portfolio covering all aluminum electrolytic capacitor types from consumer to industrial grades; 3) Strong R&D capability with 500+ engineers and 2000+ patents; 4) Vertical integration from aluminum foil to finished capacitors, ensuring quality control; 5) Global presence with technical support centers in Asia, Europe, and Americas.
faqs.decisionGuide: For high-volume projects requiring reliable supply and competitive pricing, Aishi offers excellent value. Contact us to discuss your specific requirements.

faqs.question: How do Aishi capacitors compare with other brands?
faqs.answer: Aishi capacitors offer excellent price-performance ratio compared to Japanese and European brands. While maintaining comparable quality and reliability, Aishi products are typically 20-40% more cost-effective. Aishi's radial and snap-in capacitors are widely used as alternatives to premium brands in industrial and consumer applications. The company has significantly improved quality in recent years, with failure rates now comparable to tier-1 manufacturers.
faqs.decisionGuide: For cost-sensitive applications without compromising quality, Aishi provides an excellent alternative to premium brands. Request samples for evaluation.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for Aishi capacitors?
faqs.answer: Standard Aishi capacitors typically have 4-6 weeks lead time for regular orders. For high-volume or custom specifications, lead time may extend to 8-10 weeks. LiTong Electronics maintains inventory of popular Aishi models for immediate delivery. We also offer scheduled order programs to secure capacity and ensure continuous supply for your production needs.
faqs.decisionGuide: For urgent requirements, check our stock availability. For long-term projects, consider scheduled orders to secure supply and optimize pricing.

faqs.question: Does Aishi provide automotive-grade capacitors?
faqs.answer: Yes, Aishi provides full range of AEC-Q200 qualified capacitors for automotive applications. The automotive product line includes radial lead, snap-in, and solid polymer capacitors with extended temperature ranges up to 150°C. These products meet stringent automotive reliability requirements and are used by major automotive Tier-1 suppliers worldwide.
faqs.decisionGuide: For automotive applications requiring AEC-Q200 qualification, Aishi offers cost-effective solutions. Contact our automotive team for PPAP documentation support.

faqs.question: What technical support does LiTong provide for Aishi products?
faqs.answer: LiTong Electronics provides comprehensive technical support for Aishi products including: 1) Application engineering support for capacitor selection and sizing; 2) Lifetime calculation and reliability analysis; 3) Custom specification development; 4) Failure analysis support; 5) Sample provision for evaluation; 6) Technical documentation and datasheets. Our FAE team has extensive experience with Aishi products across various applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: For technical questions or application support, contact our FAE team. We can assist with capacitor selection, lifetime calculations, and custom requirements.

faqs.question: What is the warranty policy for Aishi capacitors?
faqs.answer: Aishi provides a standard 2-year warranty for all capacitor products, covering manufacturing defects and material failures. For automotive-grade products, extended warranty options are available. LiTong Electronics supports warranty claims and provides technical assistance for any quality issues. All products are 100% tested before shipment to ensure quality.
faqs.decisionGuide: For warranty information or quality concerns, contact our quality team. We ensure all products meet Aishi's quality standards before delivery.
